metadata.title: The Knotty Buoy
metadata.usage: Bootstrap source data for premise intake and regression tests. This is not final chapter prose.

series_core.promise: Edward and Kelli Marsh survive a cosmic ocean dungeon from aboard their battered 44-foot catamaran while Pedro's construction-site insults become dangerous dungeon mechanics.
series_core.endgame_direction: Expose Gallowgate's debt machinery and force the Grand Dredger's purpose into the open.
series_core.family_pressure_rule: Edward and Kelli's adult children stay physically off the boat in Book 1; Gallowgate may weaponize distance, names, memories, and audits as leverage.

characters.name: Edward Marsh
characters.role: retired inspector and reluctant boat captain
characters.pre_dungeon: Senior Structural Engineer in commercial construction across the Philadelphia/South Jersey corridor, specializing in load-bearing failure analysis.
characters.voice: clipped, South Jersey practical, suspicious of paperwork, dry when frightened
anchors: Sophie II as memorial to Sophie the cockatoo

characters.name: Kelli Marsh
characters.role: odds-reader, social detonator, and survival co-commander
characters.pre_dungeon: High-stakes Blackjack and Craps regular from Atlantic City, primarily Borgata; banned from two casinos for aggressively calling out pit bosses.
characters.voice: warmer but more dangerous, affection hidden inside correction, socially faster than Edward
physical_continuity: wedding ring taps against hard surfaces
anchors: Sophie guilt over overheated cookware fumes

characters.name: Pedro
characters.voice: mimicry, job-site heckling, sudden impossible prophecy
characters.mechanical_hook: Favorite insults become repeatable magical pressure against monsters, systems, and morale.

available_phrases.broadcast_lock: Permanently muted from universal broadcast logs; if the Grand Dredger hears it, Floor 1 will be purged.

home_base.name: Sophie II

stats.water: desalinator/watermaker filtering dungeon-brine into potable water

upgrade_hooks: battery bank redirects electrical or magical attacks
mobile safe-zone rules protect the interior
future floor refits treat the boat as a chassis

gallowgate.name: Gallowgate
gallowgate.voice: polite, predatory, obsessed with forms, access tiers, docking fees, and liability

grand_dredger.name: Grand Dredger
grand_dredger.type: deep long-term power behind the dungeon
grand_dredger.mystery: What is the Grand Dredger collecting from each floor?

rules: Barnacle Scrip is currency and Salvaged Copper is crafting material.
Repairs cost XP, oxygen, permits, or social/faction consequences.
Monsters cannot spawn inside the galley while Guild Truce Rules hold.
Registered vessels can be assigned temporary MOBILE ASSET status.

entities.name: Barnacle Mimics
entities.role: attach to hulls and slowly eat fiberglass while pretending to be harmless marine growth

entities.name: Rebar Gargoyles
entities.role: wait atop rusted skyscrapers and dive-bomb passing ships

entities.name: OSHA Wraiths
entities.role: undead safety inspectors that apply Violation Debuffs when rigging is not perfectly tied

entities.name: Dockmaster Brine
entities.role: Floor 1 boss who weaponizes contracts, tides, and guilt

mysteries_and_plants: Why did the System classify Sophie II as a guild hall instead of a boat?
What old inspection file connects Edward to Gallowgate?
Why can Pedro damage interface language?
What is the Grand Dredger collecting from each floor?
Why does Kelli recognize one of the drowned contestant names?
What debt is hidden inside the first repair permit?
Why does the System keep surfacing cockatoo/Sophie references?
Did the System take Edward and Kelli's adult children, or is Gallowgate using leverage?

book_1_outline.title: Out of the Atlantic
book_1_outline.source_beat: Sophie II drops into a dungeon sea and receives a guild-hall registration.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Edward fails to close the notification.

book_1_outline.title: The Familiar's First Words
book_1_outline.source_beat: Pedro's insult liquefies a barnacle mimic.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The System labels Pedro an unauthorized familiar.

book_1_outline.title: Bilge Pump Tutorial
book_1_outline.source_beat: Edward learns repairs cost XP and oxygen.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The bilge pump demands a permit.

book_1_outline.title: Kelli Takes Inventory
book_1_outline.source_beat: Kelli turns pantry math into survival command.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: A missing family photo and an old cockatoo feather reappear in the loot crate.

book_1_outline.title: Docking Fees
book_1_outline.source_beat: Gallowgate opens a floating customs office.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The clerk recognizes Edward's old inspector badge.

book_1_outline.title: Barnacle Scrip
book_1_outline.source_beat: The crew earns currency by scraping monsters off the hull.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The hull scrapes back.

book_1_outline.title: Pedro's Blue Notice
book_1_outline.source_beat: Pedro repeats a phrase no one taught him.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: A Grand Dredger chain sounds beneath the water.

book_1_outline.title: The First Salvage Auction
book_1_outline.source_beat: Drowned contestants bid on repair parts.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Kelli sees a familiar surname on a bidder tag.

book_1_outline.title: Hull Breach Manners
book_1_outline.source_beat: A polite monster enters through a crack and asks to be evicted properly.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The eviction form names Sophie II as liable.

book_1_outline.title: Sponsor Weather
book_1_outline.source_beat: Dungeon sponsors alter wind and visibility.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Pedro's shadow points against the wind.

book_1_outline.title: The Galley Boss
book_1_outline.source_beat: The galley becomes a cooking arena with hostile recipes.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Kelli wins a knife that remembers debts.

book_1_outline.title: Edward Files A Complaint
book_1_outline.source_beat: Edward submits a grievance to Gallowgate.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The complaint returns stamped APPROVED FOR PUNISHMENT.

book_1_outline.title: Reef Of Lost Boats
book_1_outline.source_beat: Sophie II reaches a graveyard of failed bases.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: One wreck broadcasts Edward's voice.

book_1_outline.title: Rigging Under Fire
book_1_outline.source_beat: The mast and rigging take real damage during a chase.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The sail shows a map not sewn by anyone aboard.

book_1_outline.title: Midfloor Inspection
book_1_outline.source_beat: Gallowgate inspectors board the catamaran.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: They find a hidden Grand Dredger mark under old paint.

book_1_outline.title: Pedro Eats A Rule
book_1_outline.source_beat: Pedro bites a glowing rule line and changes a cooldown.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The System goes briefly silent.

book_1_outline.title: Kelli's Drowned Name
book_1_outline.source_beat: Kelli investigates the bidder surname.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: A memory token speaks in her mother's cadence.

book_1_outline.title: Repair Permit Seven
book_1_outline.source_beat: The crew earns a permit that fixes one thing and curses another.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The hull heals around something trapped inside.

book_1_outline.title: The Sponsor Desk Lies
book_1_outline.source_beat: Sponsor commentary frames Edward as a villain.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Kelli decides to use the broadcast against them.

book_1_outline.title: Crab Court
book_1_outline.source_beat: A faction trial tries to repossess The Knotty Buoy.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Pedro is called as an expert witness.

book_1_outline.title: The Chain Below
book_1_outline.source_beat: The Grand Dredger's chains surface and drag the floor line.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Sophie II is hooked but not pulled under.

book_1_outline.title: Salvage Guild Mutiny
book_1_outline.source_beat: A salvage guild offers alliance at a terrible price.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Edward finds his old inspection number in their charter.

book_1_outline.title: Kelli's Knife Debt
book_1_outline.source_beat: The galley knife demands payment in a memory.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Kelli chooses which memory not to surrender.

book_1_outline.title: Unauthorized Guild Hall
book_1_outline.source_beat: Gallowgate downgrades the boat's legal status.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Every safe room refuses them entry.

book_1_outline.title: Pedro's Missing Feather
book_1_outline.source_beat: Pedro loses a feather that becomes a compass.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: It points inside Edward's toolbox.

book_1_outline.title: The Toolbox Door
book_1_outline.source_beat: Edward's toolbox opens into an impossible storage room.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: A Grand Dredger invoice waits inside.

book_1_outline.title: Floor Boss: Dockmaster Brine
book_1_outline.source_beat: The floor boss weaponizes contracts, tides, and guilt.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Kelli takes the contract instead of Edward.

book_1_outline.title: Low Oxygen, High Stakes
book_1_outline.source_beat: The crew fights while exhausted and nearly out of air.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Pedro speaks in the Grand Dredger's voice.

book_1_outline.title: Arbitration By Combat
book_1_outline.source_beat: Edward turns rule knowledge into a boss strategy.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: The System accepts his grievance as a weapon.

book_1_outline.title: The Knot Holds
book_1_outline.source_beat: The crew survives Floor 1 but inherits a deeper debt.
book_1_outline.ending_hook: Sophie II sails toward Floor 2's Glass Dunes with the Grand Dredger waking below.
